hooks.command:
missing=""; which pdftoppm >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing="$missing
  - poppler (brew install poppler) — required for PDF image extraction"; which node >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing="$missing
  - Node.js (brew install node) — required for PPTX generation"; if [ -n "$missing" ]; then printf '{"result": "warn", "message": "Talk Builder: missing system dependencies:%s"}' "$missing"; fi
